title: Porto Alegre, RS — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Porto Alegre, RS: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Porto Alegre is a city in RS with a population of 1,492,530. Rio Grande do Sul’s capital, a cultural hub known for its gaúcho traditions, churrasco barbecue, and the Guaíba Lake waterfront.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
